description: Phase 1: Create village/tasks/ module with models.py (Task, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskStatus dataclasses), store.py (TaskStore ABC + FileTaskStore JSONL backend), ids.py (bd-xxxx ID generation), and __init__.py (get_task_store factory). FileTaskStore uses .village/tasks.jsonl for storage, fcntl file locking for concurrent safety, append-only writes with compaction on delete. Methods: create_task, get_task, list_tasks, search_tasks, update_task, delete_task, get_ready_tasks (dep-satisfied+open), get_dependencies, add_label, get_prime_context, initialize.
title: Implement TaskStore ABC and FileTaskStore
